text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: allanjude
Date: Thu Aug  7 15:15:42 UTC 2014
New revision: 45416
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/doc/45416

Log:
  The GELI module is built by default, but the GENERIC kernel does not include GELI by default.
  Correct the handbook to reflect this

  PR:		192453
  Approved by:	bcr (mentor)

Changes:
  head/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/handbook/disks/chapter.xml
